name: saas-launch
description: Build and launch a SaaS product end to end. Design the API, plan the database, set up CI/CD, define pricing tiers, and create a growth content strategy. From idea to deployed product.

config.instruction: Design the REST API for the SaaS product. Define endpoints, request/response schemas, authentication method, rate limiting, and versioning strategy.
Design the database schema to support the API. Choose appropriate patterns (multi-tenant, event sourcing, CQRS, etc.). Define tables, relationships, indexes, and migration strategy.
Set up the CI/CD pipeline: test on PR, build on merge, deploy on tag. Include staging and production environments, rollback strategy, and monitoring.
Define pricing tiers for the SaaS product. Include free tier, pro tier, and enterprise tier with feature gates, usage limits, and billing frequency. Benchmark against competitors.
Create a content-driven growth strategy: SEO keywords, blog topics, social media calendar, email sequences for onboarding and retention. Focus on the first 90 days post-launch.
